description: Graded NLQ question set. Each question is run through the live loop; the answer is graded by whether it CALLED the expected tool(s) and its text CONTAINS the expected substrings (case-insensitive). Deliberately behavioral, not exact-match: the model's prose varies, its tool plan should not. Run against any configured planner (OpenAI-compatible or Bedrock); falls back to the offline heuristic with no model. Never in CI.

questions.ask: how many flights are there right now?
what's the breakdown of aircraft types?
find the flight with callsign SYN0
show me the flight whose callsign is SYN5
how many flights are below 3000 meters?
how many flights are above 10000 meters?
what are the p50 and p99 altitudes?
what are the velocity percentiles across all flights?
is the cluster healthy? how many shards answered?
